exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your affiliate marketing forward
items: Create a content calendar with 30 days of affiliate marketing post ideas for your chosen niche
Write your first product review or comparison post featuring 2-3 affiliate products in your niche
Create a video tutorial or how-to guide demonstrating one of your affiliate products in action
Design and create lead magnets (free guides, checklists, or templates) to build an email list for your affiliate marketing funnel
Develop a series of before-and-after case studies showcasing real results from products you promote as an affiliate
Create an SEO-optimized blog post targeting a high-volume keyword in your niche that naturally incorporates your affiliate products
